author: Johanes Isnerus
title: Expositio missae / Declaratio brevis quasi totius missae et tota ipsius canonis
editions: ed. Zawadski, R. M., Warsaw: Akademia Teologii Katolickiej, 1971
remarks: Cracow, Biblioteki Jagiellonskiej MS 2220; inc. : Queritur quare sacerdos quando primo. "In explaining the Most Holy Sacrifice, he dwells quite extensively on transubstantiation. In the exposition of the Holy Mass, he omitted pastoral advice and abuses."
link: Cambridge, Corpus Christi College, MS 500 (f. 1r ff) and Cracow, Biblioteki Jagiellonskiej MS 2220 [only two extant copies]
